top_signals.title: Canada’s Forgotten Shale Gas Play Reemerges as Oil Hot Spot
top_signals.summary: On the edge of the Canadian Rocky Mountains, companies including Obsidian Energy Ltd. and Yangarra Resources Corp. are breathing new life into a long-dormant gas reservoir — except now they’re drilling for oil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Citigroup Sees Bondholders Recover 50% of Senegal’s Debt Under Revamp
top_signals.summary: Holders of Senegal’s dollar bonds could end up recouping less than 50% of the face value of the securities in the event of a restructuring — below the prices at which the debt currently trades, according to Citigroup Inc.
